title: Meal Mate
description: A full stack CRUD web application for a food-ordering business.
Challenges: Joining in with an existing team, programming a pre-designed website, dealing with varying amounts of experience.

title: Harmonaut
description: A VR runner game with a musical instrument as the controller. I used Fast Fourier Transform to capture the note played and made short melodies or musical intervals as button presses to navigate moving obstacles.

title: Odegand Poster campaign
description: A project for the Odegand Music festival in Ghent. The idea was to spread posters throughout the city that come to life in 3D when scanned with a phone.

title: Darius_ Website
description: I made a website for upcoming singer-songwriter and poet Darius_. I used this as a chance to practice my React knowledge. I still update and manage this website to this day.

title: Diorama: Grandma's house
description: A diorama of a house, made for the 3D Modeling course in DAE. I used Blender to model the house and its surroundings.

title: Pebbles
description: My first team project. We made a web-app to motivate chronic pain patients to excercise, and to track their mental well-being.
